series_metadata.series_description: Licensure development applications, correspondence regarding applications, approval or denial letters, development rule waiver documentation (requests for waivers and approval/ denial of waiver).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically, then recycle. ; Electronic: Retain for five years from the effective date of development or rule waiver. If development or rule waiver was denied, five years from the date of the request., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
